title: Pixl 8x
description:
Simplistic Isometric texture pack inspired by the Console Plastic texture pack
By: Hawwi / Halal
body:
Simplistic Isometric texture pack inspired by the Console Plastic texture pack
By: Hawwi / Halal

Notes
- Isometric style texture pack (blocks and items have depth)
- Custom block and item models + textures (including 3D blocks)
- All blocks have a custom item model in the inventory, giving it a depth effect
- WIP
- Lots of unfinished textures

To do..
- fix some bugs
-add remaining textures

Credits
Me
Levi Szekeres - Pxlxxl font
